title: Closeout Step 10: invert confirmation logic — proceed unless explicit cancel
signal: Step 10 banner previously required explicit affirmative. Any side comment, question, or non-yes response caused indefinite stall. Fix: proceed by default. Only stop on explicit 'no', 'cancel', 'stop', 'abort', or 'wait'. Questions answered then commit continues without re-presenting banner. Banner text: 'Proceeding in 10s — reply cancel to stop.'
